column1: Do you prefer to teach back-to-back common office hours in the Math Resource Room?
column4:
Mark each time slot with an X  from 7:30 am until 5:20 pm that you are not free to teach because of your course/seminar schedule. Please note that 90-minute classes block out two consecutive time slots. For example, if you are taking a Tuesday, Thursday 10:30-11:45 am class, then you should mark the four slots Tuesday 10:30-11:20, Tuesday 11:30-12:20, Thursday 10:30-11:20, and Thursday 11:30-12:20. Please do not mark time slots with an X if you are available to teach at that time. 
Remember: Unmarked time slots mean you are available to teach at that time. - 7:30am-8:20am - Monday

For example, if you are taking a Tuesday, Thursday 10:30-11:45 am class, then you should mark the four slots Tuesday 10:30-11:20, Tuesday 11:30-12:20, Thursday 10:30-11:20, and Thursday 11:30-12:20. Please do not mark time slots with an X if you are available to teach at that time. 
Remember: Unmarked time slots mean you are available to teach at that time. - 4:30pm-5:20pm - Tuesday
